findings.description: Accepted state allowed a clean scan for different bytes and a 30-day window.
findings.repair: Preflight and trigger require exact current clean scan/hash/MIME and at most seven days.

findings.description: Direct row locking required an unacceptable artifact mutation privilege.
findings.repair: Tenant-bound fixed-search-path boolean SECURITY DEFINER function, PUBLIC revoked, no artifact UPDATE.

findings.description: Accepted object identity could mutate without rescanning.
findings.repair: All-row trigger makes accepted identity immutable.

findings.description: Corrupt history lacked an automated migration-stop gate.
findings.repair: CI requires exact failure and verifies rollback.

findings.description: Symlinked node_modules changed the PDF worker permission boundary.
findings.repair: Detached verifier uses npm ci from the lockfile.

open_global_findings: Cases, APIs, frontend/accessibility, consumers and platform operations incomplete.
